sections_cited: Sections 205/137 and 137 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 2372 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For order on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 9550/26. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.05.2026 Mr. Ali Almani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, Advocate for Respondent ---------- Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent, which is taken on record. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings on the basis of impugned direction and notice under Sections 205/137 and 137 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals). Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner (Appeals) to decide the pending Appeal(s) of the Petitioner (s), to which learned counsel for the Respondent concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals) to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner preferably within 30 days from passing of this Order, whereas, during such period the Respondent / department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. The Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application. Judge Judge Ayaz
